title: Tough Egg
move_pattern: Uses Hatch once, then repeatedly uses Nibble
notes: Transforms during combat: starts as an Egg protected by Hatch Power. The Hatch move must be played on the first turn, which removes Hatch Power, increases max HP from 15-19 to 20-23, and transitions to Hatchling form. After hatching, repeatedly attacks with Nibble (5 damage each). Hatchling damage scales with DeadlyEnemies ascension (ascension: 5, base: 4).
